Product features:

  • Looking for the perfect machine washable area rug that blends elegance and functionality? Look no further than our versatile area rugs, meticulously crafted to harmonize with every corner of your home. With its low-pile construction, effortlessly complements various indoor settings. Its special features, including machine washability, non-slip backing, and stain resistance, make it an ideal choice for high-traffic areas like the living room, dining room, bedroom, hallway, kitchen, or playroom.
  • ✅【Super Soft and Durable】: Our washable area rugs 9x12 are made with high-quality, super-soft material. They will not shed fibers or be inhaled. Exquisite boho rug designs suitable for a variety of decoration styles. Our machine washable area rugs can add classic and ideal colors to any place.
  • ✅【Versatile and Stylish Design】: Beyond its stylish design, our 9x12 area rug is also eco-friendly. It's a foldable 9x12 area rug for convenient storage, easy to clean, and built to withstand daily life. These 9x12 area rug make the perfect addition to any home.
  • ✅【Machine Washable and Easy to Clean】: Our machine washable 9x12 area rugs are designed for easy maintenance. It's conveniently machine washable, ensuring that you can effortlessly keep your large area rug looking fresh and vibrant without the hassle of manual cleaning.
  • ✅【Non-Slip and Non-Shedding】: Our 9 x 12 area rugs are made of durable chenille fibers with a stain-resistant carpet surface that you can use for years to come! Low pile area rug is dry and cozy. Not only is it easy to clean and care for, but it also adds warmth to your home. The 9x12 area rug is backed with TPR, a safer and friendlier non-slip material.
  • ✅【Kids & Pets Friendly】: With our area rugs 9x12, pet dander and hair won't get trapped inside, preventing pets and children from chewing or scratching. Pets' paws won't get snagged or caught on edges, causing them to scratch floors. Our area rugs 9x12 for living room, bedrooms , and dining rooms are a good choice for kids and pets.
  • ✅【Low Pile Height】: Pile thickness is 0.14 inches for a soft feeling underfoot and for seamless placement underneath furniture or in entryways.
